_meta.note: Live alerts tied to verified catalysts (CELC, MNKD, VERA, CORT).

alerts.message: CELC PDUFA in 4 days (2026-07-17) — binary breast-cancer decision on gedatolisib. Pre-event explainer + trial teardown must ship first.
BK-101 CELC pre-PDUFA explainer scheduled 2026-07-15; BK-102 teardown in compliance review — captions still pending.
MNKD PDUFA 2026-07-26 is 'Likely' (aggregator-sourced). Verify against MannKind press release / SEC 8-K before publishing BK-105.
VERA TRUTAKNA approved 2026-07-07 — post-mortem (BK-106) due; keep the accelerated-approval caveat (long-term eGFR benefit not yet established).
CELC 2nd-indication (PIK3CA-mutant) sNDA timing unconfirmed — flagged Estimated in the catalyst calendar; do not schedule dated content yet.
CORT Q2 earnings 2026-07-30 — watch Lifyorli launch commentary; refresh the CORT dossier before BK-107.
